questions.question: Which control best limits lateral movement after endpoint compromise?
questions.description: Segmentation reduces how far an attacker can move from the initially compromised system.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a security baseline?
questions.description: A baseline defines expected secure settings for systems, services, and applications.

questions.question: Which log source is most useful for investigating suspicious user sign-ins?
questions.description: Authentication logs reveal successful and failed sign-ins, source IPs, device context, and timestamps.

questions.question: Which vulnerability is commonly caused by unsanitized database input?
questions.description: SQL injection occurs when input is interpreted as database commands instead of data.

questions.question: What does an EDR platform primarily monitor?
questions.description: EDR monitors endpoint events such as processes, files, registry changes, and network connections.
